pageContext.name: Masked Soldier
pageContext.description: The Masked Soldier from the smash-hit Netflix series Squid Game joins S.H.Figuarts! Standing 5.7 inches tall and featuring multiple points of articulation for easy posing and featuring a number of optional and removable accessories, this figure is sure to cast an imposing presence in your collection. Includes handgun and machine gun accessories, plus a papercraft coffin for added realism.
